headline: What I can build for you
subheadline: A modern website should look sharp, load fast, and convert visitors into customers. Here are the core services I offer.

items.title: Landing pages that convert
items.text: Clear messaging, strong hierarchy, and a flow designed around your offer — not just pretty visuals.

items.title: Business websites
items.text: Multi-section sites for local businesses and brands, with SEO fundamentals and a premium feel.

items.title: Product & startup sites
items.text: Tech-forward marketing sites that explain your product fast and make users trust it.
